text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
I drop by the park to take a breather<n>from work,
when...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: I've got a changeup comin' atcha<n>next! Hup!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text: Shwip... Thwack!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Nice, looks like I'm getting the hang<n>of it!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
I'm loving these pitches of yours!<n>This match is
as good as yours.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
The younger students are gonna love<n>this—you'll
be so cool in their eyes! ♪<n>Man, I'm already
jealous!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Ahaha... Me? I dunno...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Everyone was cheerin' me on in my<n>last race, but
I still lost.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: I'm not as cool as they make me out<n>to be.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: But, Ryan...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Hey, wipe that worried look off your<n>face! I don't
plan on throwing in the<n>towel!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
I've been doing twice as many sets<n>at the gym to
make up for it! Just<n>gotta keep up the grind till my
next<n>race.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
If I wanna live up to what everyone<n>thinks of me,
then I'll need to put in<n>the reps!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
Hey-hey! Give me another one, will<n>ya? Every ball
you throw is going in<n>this glove!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Huh? Oh, sure...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Here it comes!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text: Fwoosh... Thwack!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
Great pitch! You put some real feeling<n>into that
one!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
You really are super cool, Ryan! When<n>you run,
when you're hard at work,<n>and... just all the time!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Huh? What do you mean?

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
You're good at everything you try<n>your hand at.
That's what makes you<n>so cool!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
But... sometimes you get stuck in your<n>own head
when things don't go your<n>way.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
Still, you always get back on your<n>feet. You work
hard every day, filled<n>with as much enthusiasm as
the day<n>before!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
You're plenty cool just the way you<n>are. That's
why everyone loves you,<n>Ryan!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Just the way I am, huh...

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
Yup! That's coming from me, so you<n>know it's the
truth!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Ahaha! I guess so!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: I wonder if everyone feels the same<n>way.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: Well, I think you're cool when yourun, when you push your limits—geez,even your smile is cool! You're socool you've got me swooning! ♪

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Wh-whoa, hey now... It's kinda<n>embarrassing to
be complimented so<n>much!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
It's important to listen to words of<n>support with an
open heart—especially<n>for an Umamusume with
such vocal<n>fans.
